choices: You wake up tied to a chair in front of your slutty mother
You wake up in an Alien cave
1.content:
"I'm so sick of mom's shit", you said walking home alone from school.

Walking in the dark. Again.

Not the best situation for a 15 year old in the inner city, but it was what it was.

Your mother had chased off your father with her cheating when you were only 7, and her attitude has never changed since then.

She had you when she was 15, so you've been stuck with her irresponsible, yet squishy ass for 8 years.

Man after man had come and gone from your home, seeing as your 29 year old mom's good looks continued into her late 20's.

As you reached your house, you heard a whizzing scream of some sort over your head.

"What the heck is that sound"?, you exclaimed.

The sound continued to grow louder as it got closer to your home.

Shriller and shriller it became until you rushed your hands to your ears, wondering when it would stop.

Then...silence.

"I guess it was nothing".

You lowered your hands and began to work your way up to your door when all of a sudden...

CLANG!

The last thing you saw was a shovel before you were knocked out cold.
1.title: Trail of Titties From Space

info.brief_description: An insidious app allows users to make immortal hosts ripe for possession..
info.description:
**GIFT POINTS FOR GOOD CHAPTERS!**

James had a thirst for death and the female body , but never
wanted to actually kill or endanger anyone..
until a alien visitor gave him an Unidentified phone app to fulfill Both his
desires.

The app destroys the soul of the Body it targets, and makes it an
Immortal human host you can possess forever.

Your body will continue your daily life as though you never left. He will have no knowledge of your possessions, and will have his memories wiped when you return to your body, so you can choose to "surprise" him with the groping of your new body every time you switch hosts.
